_comment: S71 Day 4 — Lighthouse CI floor for the compiled landing page.
_comment3: The dist-integrated build with the WASM live hero is exercised by the
_comment4: wasm-size CI gate (S71 Day 1) — no need to double-cover here. Desktop
_comment5: preset is used because mobile Lighthouse scores are notoriously noisy on
_comment6: GitHub-hosted runners; we'd rather have a stable gate that catches
_comment7: real regressions than a flaky one that masks them.
